trust.notes: Bootstrapped from `README.md`, `CODEOWNERS`, `SECURITY.md`, and `pyproject.toml`. Maintainer information was imported from CODEOWNERS; `owners.team` is `@pytorch/pytorch-dev-infra` because it is the clearest imported team signal, but `owners.maintainers` still preserves narrower owner candidates. SECURITY.md provided a policy or reporting URL rather than a direct mailbox, so `security_contact` preserves that URL. Imported `repo.build` from `pyproject.toml`. Imported `repo.test` from `pyproject.toml`. This is an overlay bootstrap, not a maintainer-controlled canonical record.
